title: jasminum fluminense
intro: Jasminum fluminense, also known as the Brazilian night-blooming jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. This plant is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Jasminum fluminense include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve sleep quality due to its sedative properties. The plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
